title: Validate MeshCore incoming events with real BLE client
description: Why this exists: native_sim/fake BLE tests cover MeshCore incoming app-event behavior, but a real MeshCore-compatible BLE client has not validated the user-visible smoke path. What needs to be done: on hardware with BLE enabled, connect a MeshCore client, inject incoming LICHEN text/status events, verify MSG_WAITING/SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE delivery, disconnect/reconnect behavior, and queue-full behavior from the app perspective.
acceptance_criteria: Physical BLE smoke test records board, client/app version, commands/events exercised, pass/fail evidence, and any observed protocol/client incompatibilities.
notes: Blocked for this no-hardware run: requires a physical BLE-capable board/phone or MeshCore client transport and real BLE session validation. Native_sim/fake BLE coverage was completed under project-LICHEN-9c4y.8; physical smoke evidence remains unavailable locally.
